items.title: US says it fired missile at Iran-bound oil tanker
items.dek: The US military says the vessel's engine room was hit after the crew "ignored repeated warnings".
items.body: The US military says the vessel's engine room was hit after the crew "ignored repeated warnings".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: NASA Testing Wastewater Treatment Facility for Future Moon Base
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump taps housing official Bill Pulte to be US spymaster
items.dek: The head of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, who pushed for criminal charges against Trump's foes, will step in as acting Director of National Intelligence.
items.body: The head of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, who pushed for criminal charges against Trump's foes, will step in as acting Director of National Intelligence.
items.author: IriLine Desk
